name: Loath Keep
implicitMods: 11% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Cold Damage
+25% to Critical Strike Multiplier for Spell Damage
explicitMods: +86 to maximum Energy Shield
108% increased Energy Shield
+48% to Fire Resistance
+38% to Cold Resistance
16% increased Stun and Block Recovery

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports any skill with a duration.
explicitMods: Supported Skills have 49% more Skill Effect Duration
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Places a Sigil on the ground, which grants a buff to you and allies in the area around it for a duration. The Sigil gains stages as you spend mana in its area, making the buff more powerful. You can only have one Sigil of Power at a time.
explicitMods: Base duration is 12.00 seconds
Gains a Stage when you Spend a total of 400 Mana while in Area
Enemies in Area deal 19% less Damage while at maximum Stages
Maximum 4 Stages
Buff grants 7 to 141 Added Lightning Damage per Stage
Minimum 1 second between Stages
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Place a Frost Shield that drains your energy shield for one second or until you run out, gaining stages while this drain occurs. The Frost Shield takes some damage from hits in place of you and allies while in its area. Enemies in the area are Chilled. You can only have one Frost Shield active at once.
explicitMods: Base duration is 10.00 seconds
20% of Damage dealt to you or Allies in Area with Hits by Enemies in Area is taken from Frost Shield's Life before your Life or Energy Shield
60% of Damage dealt to you or Allies in Area with Hits by Enemies outside Area is taken from Frost Shield's Life before your Life or Energy Shield
You gain +0.38% to Spell Critical Strike Chance per Stage while in Area
Frost Shield has 910 maximum Life per Stage
Maximum 4 Stages
Gains 1 Stage every 0.3 seconds while you are losing Energy Shield
You lose 730 Energy Shield per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills, making them repeat when cast. Cannot support Vaal skills, totem skills, channelling skills, triggered skills, instant skills, retaliation skills, blink skills, or skills with a reservation.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Repeat an additional time
Supported Skills have 54% more Cast Speed
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that deal damage with hits and have no reservation. Cannot support arcane skills, Brand skills, Orb skills, Vaal skills, or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills gain Added Lightning Damage equal to 16% of Unreserved Maximum Mana
Supported Skills gain Base Mana Cost equal to 5% of Unreserved Maximum Mana
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies in an area at both ends of the teleport. Deals higher damage to chilled enemies, then removes chill from them. Cannot be supported by Unleash.
explicitMods: Deals 916 to 1374 Cold Damage
This Spell's Cast Time is added to its Cooldown if Triggered
+0.3 metres to radius
Cannot inflict Chill
15% more Damage with Hits per 5% Chill Effect on Enemy

name: Widowhail
explicitMods: 240% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
flavourText: "I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe

explicitMods: +120 to maximum Mana

flavourText: The world is but a piece of parchment, blank and symmetric.
We label each side: one Good, one Evil; one Black, one White.
The divine truth, however, is that both are one and the same.
-Jaetai, Vaal Advisor
